records.stderr_pattern: Could not transfer artifact.*Connection refused|Connection timed out|transfer failed for https://
records.description: Maven/Gradle dependency download failed — retry with backoff for transient network issues

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Could not transfer artifact org.springframework:spring-core:pom:6.1.2 from/to central: Connection refused" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: Received status code 50[0-9] from server|502 Bad Gateway|503 Service Unavailable
records.description: Maven repository returning 5xx — retry with longer backoff

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Received status code 503 from server: Service Unavailable" >&2; exit 1'
